/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsolution_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libsolution_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/solution_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/solution_interfaces/srv/detail/assign__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/solution/ros2_ws/build/solution_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libsolution_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
